titleStmt.title: SII 10.278: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 278. (A.R. No. 606 of 1909.) ON A PILLAR LYING IN FRONT OF THE TEMPLE OF KŌDANḌARĀMASVĀMI, MŌṬUPALLI, BAPATLA TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT. Ś. 1153. (Khara.)

summary.p: States that Siddayadēva-Mahārāja of the family of Mukkaṇṭi Kāḍu[vaṭṭi*] gave away the village of Ādūru to the temple of Gaṇapatiprasanna-Kēśavadēva at Mōṭṭupalli for the merit of Kākatīya Gaṇapatidēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti yanēkamahāmaṁḍa
larājādhirājarājapara
mēśvara pallavakulatilaka
bharadvājagōtra lalitāddacaṁ
dradhara khaṭvāṁgadhvaja kaḍuvā
yupaṟapōṣaṇa vriṣa
bhalāṁcchana vēṁgaḷanāḍikā
ṁccipuravarādhīśvara kōṭyā
ṁbikālabdhavaraprasā dā
nēkaripunripatimaṇima
kuṭaghaṭitacaraṇāraviṁ
da bhūlōkacātu¨rvvannasa
ptaśatāgrahārapratiṣṭita
nityagaṁgājalasnānāvi
nōdu laina śrīmukkaṁṭṭi
kāḍuvaṁśāvatāru laina
śrīmanumahāmaṁḍḍa
lēśvara siddaya dēvama
mahārājulu tamataṁḍri
malidēvamahārājuna
ku dhammuvugā svasti śrīśa
kavaruṣaṁbulu 115
3 nēṁṭṭi kharasaṁvatsara
jēṣṭabahaḷapaṁcādaśi
guruvāramuna sū¨ryya
grahaṇanimityamuna sa
mudrātīra śrīmadvēḷā
nagara maina śrīmatu mō
ṭṭupalli śrīgaṇapatiprasa
nnakēśavadēvaraku kākatiga
ṇapatidēvamahārājudha
¨rmmuvugā havibaliA[¨rca]
nalaku Aṁgaraṁgabhōgālaku
niccina Ādūru Ācaṁ
drākkamugā Istimi dha¨rmu
vu yevvaru vighnamusēyaṁ gādu
Digital edition of SII 10.278 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
